mentions.note: Cramer recommends short; has activist investor who may force something or sale, but trivial stock movement (5 bucks, couple bucks up/down) uninteresting.
Caller Eugene touted despite investigation; Cramer fighting it for years and winning; no investment case despite headline risk.
No growth, stock flat 4 years; growth buyer only—can't recommend.

Revealed lighter AR specs at Augmented World Expo with solid compute, but company has cemented itself as 'disappointter' with street. No credibility on Wall Street despite 1B MAU and <$10B market cap; Meta is the one to own, not Snap.
